ExpectedMeaning: WBC result is above the laboratory-configured high threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical information and previous results (delta check). Repeat measurement if unexpected or near decision limits. Review smear/manual differential if clinically indicated.

ExpectedMeaning: WBC result is below the laboratory-configured low threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical information and previous results. Repeat measurement if unexpected or near decision limits. Review smear/manual differential if clinically indicated.

ExpectedMeaning: HGB result is above the laboratory-configured high threshold.
ExpectedAction: Confirm plausibility and specimen condition. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Apply critical value reporting/escalation procedures if required by local policy.

ExpectedMeaning: HGB result is below the laboratory-configured low threshold.
ExpectedAction: Confirm plausibility and specimen condition. Repeat measurement (recommended when clinically significant or unexpected). Apply critical value reporting/escalation procedures if required.

ExpectedMeaning: MCV result is below the laboratory-configured low threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical context and prior results. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Consider smear review if required by SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: MCV result is above the laboratory-configured high threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical context and prior results. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Consider smear review if required by SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: MCHC result is below the laboratory-configured low threshold.
ExpectedAction: Confirm specimen/result consistency. Repeat measurement if unexpected or inconsistent. Consider smear review/manual confirmation per SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: RDW-CV result is above the laboratory-configured high threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with CBC indices and clinical history. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Consider smear review if required by SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: PLT result is below the laboratory-configured low threshold.
ExpectedAction: Repeat measurement (recommended), especially if clinically significant. Review smear/images for platelet clumping. If clumping is suspected/confirmed, follow SOP (e.g., recollection or alternative anticoagulant).

ExpectedMeaning: PLT result is above the laboratory-configured high threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical information and prior results. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Review smear if required by SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Neutrophil % and/or absolute neutrophil count is above the configured threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical context and delta check. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Review smear/manual differential if clinically indicated or required by SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Neutrophil % and/or absolute neutrophil count is below the configured threshold.
ExpectedAction: Repeat measurement if unexpected or clinically significant. Correlate with patient history and prior results. Perform smear/manual differential per SOP when required.

ExpectedMeaning: Lymphocyte % and/or absolute lymphocyte count is above the configured threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical context and delta check. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Review smear/manual differential if required by SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Lymphocyte % and/or absolute lymphocyte count is below the configured threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical context and prior results. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Perform additional review/confirmation per SOP if clinically indicated.

ExpectedMeaning: Monocyte % and/or absolute monocyte count is above the configured threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical context and delta check. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Consider smear review/manual differential per SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Eosinophil % and/or absolute eosinophil count is above the configured threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical context and prior results. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Consider smear review/manual differential per SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Basophil % and/or absolute basophil count is above the configured threshold.
ExpectedAction: Correlate with clinical context and prior results. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Consider smear review/manual differential per SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Immature granulocyte (IG) % and/or absolute IG count is above the configured threshold.
ExpectedAction: Review flagged cells/images and correlate with clinical context/delta check. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Perform smear review/manual differential if required by SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Proportion of abnormal lymphocyte–flagged cells meets "Present" criterion.
ExpectedAction: Review flagged cells; consider manual confirmation per SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Proportion of atypical/reactive lymphocyte–flagged cells meets "Present" criterion.
ExpectedAction: Review flagged cells; confirm per SOP if required.

ExpectedMeaning: Proportion of blast-flagged cells meets "Present" criterion.
ExpectedAction: Manual confirmation; escalate per SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Proportion of IG-flagged cells meets "Present" criterion.
ExpectedAction: Review flagged cells; consider manual differential per SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Proportion of nRBC-flagged cells meets "Present" criterion.
ExpectedAction: Review flagged cells; consider interpretation impact; confirm per SOP.

ExpectedMeaning: Platelet clumping meets "Present" criterion; PLT results may be affected.
ExpectedAction: Treat PLT with caution until verified; repeat and confirm clumping; follow SOP for recollection/alternative tube if needed.

ExpectedMeaning: Smudge cell pattern meets "Present" criterion.
ExpectedAction: Review smear quality + flagged cells; confirm per SOP if clinically relevant.

ExpectedMeaning: The smear may not meet intended conditions (e.g., distribution, thickness, optimal region), which can affect image analysis and result interpretation.
ExpectedAction: 1) Repeat measurement on the same specimen. 2) Inspect smear quality (adequate smear region, uniformity, feather edge/monolayer). 3) If inadequate, re-smear and repeat the test. 4) If frequent/persistent, review smear preparation workflow and perform routine QC/maintenance per IFU.

ExpectedMeaning: The stain quality may not meet intended conditions (e.g., under/overstaining, high background, precipitate), which can affect cell identification.
ExpectedAction: 1) Repeat measurement. 2) Inspect stain quality and background (including precipitate/contamination). 3) If inadequate, re-stain or re-smear/re-stain and repeat the test. 4) If frequent/persistent, review staining reagents/process and perform routine QC per IFU.

ExpectedMeaning: Internal signals suggest reduced reliability of WBC-related results. This indicates "verify before reporting," not simply a high/low value.
ExpectedAction: 1) Do not report without additional verification. 2) Repeat measurement. 3) Check specimen condition (mixing, clots/microclots, hemolysis/lipemia, storage time). 4) Review cell images/smear quality; perform manual microscopy/manual differential if required by SOP. 5) If persistent across specimens, perform instrument QC/maintenance and contact support as needed.

ExpectedMeaning: Internal signals suggest reduced reliability of platelet-related results; platelet clumping may affect PLT results.
ExpectedAction: 1) Do not report without additional verification. 2) Repeat measurement. 3) Check specimen condition (mixing, microclots). 4) Evaluate for platelet clumps in images/smear; treat PLT results with caution until verified. 5) If clumping is confirmed, follow SOP (e.g., recollection or alternative anticoagulant) and/or manual confirmation.

ExpectedMeaning: Internal signals suggest reduced reliability of RBC/CBC-related results (e.g., RBC/Hb/Hct/indices).
ExpectedAction: 1) Do not report without additional verification. 2) Repeat measurement. 3) Check specimen condition (mixing, microclots, hemolysis/lipemia, storage time). 4) Review smear/stain quality and cell images; consider manual confirmation per SOP. 5) If unresolved, re-smear/re-stain and repeat and/or request recollection per local policy.
